title: Is Your Home Wi-Fi Truly Safe?
excerpt: Most of us change our Wi-Fi passwords, but forget our router's secret back door. Follow these 4 simple steps to secure your MTN, Airtel, or Spectranet router.

title: Building a save password
excerpt: Learn how to configure a safe password for safely practice cybersecurity concepts.

title: 2FA: The Simple Lock That Stops 99% of Hacks
excerpt: Passwords alone are no longer enough to keep attackers at bay. Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds a vital second layer of defense, ensuring that stolen credentials aren't enough to grant unauthorized access.
contentPath: 2FA: The Simple Lock That Stops 99% of Hacks.md

title: Phishing-Guide
excerpt: Phishing attacks are designed to steal your credentials, but they don't have to lead to a full account takeover.

title: Cybersecurity-locks
excerpt: Lock your digital world with a three-layer fortress: enforce rigorous authentication, encrypt all data, and isolate your networks to stop attackers in their tracks.
